records.ety: [OE. prophecie, OF. profecie, F. prophtie, L. prophetia, fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to be an interpreter of the gods, to prophesy, fr. <?/ prophet. See Prophet.]

defs: A declaration of something to come; a foretelling; a prediction; esp., an inspired foretelling.
quotes: He hearkens after prophecies and dreams.
Prophecy came not in old time by the will of man.

defs: A book of prophecies; a history; as, the prophecy of Ahijah.
Public interpretation of Scripture; preaching; exhortation or instruction.
